description: Cgroup limit was raised to 2.5 GB on 2026-04-23. Verify limit still in `docker-compose.yml`, add a memory-percent gauge to `/status`, and wire a Discord webhook alert when ExitCode 137 (OOM) appears in container restart logs — OOM ≠ 502 so current monitoring misses it. Reuse the existing `notify()` helper from `/etc/vigilant/scripts/` (VPS auto-update stack), don't reinvent.
title: Container memory-budget guard + OOM alerting
